# Thesis outline — draft 3

## Chapter 1 — Introduction

- The problem: single-cell RNA-seq batch effects ruin downstream analysis.
- Why existing methods fall short: most assume Gaussian noise, real data
  is zero-inflated and overdispersed.

## Chapter 2 — Methods

- Negative binomial mixture model.
- EM algorithm for parameter estimation.

## Chapter 3 — Results

- Benchmark on the Tabula Muris dataset.
- Comparison with Harmony, Seurat, and scVI.

## Chapter 4 — Discussion

- Limitations, future work, standard disclaimers.
